subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajasthani king and city were chosen as the capital after the merger of Bikaner, Jaisalmer, Jodhpur, and Hanumangarh States?
question_hi: बीकानेर, जयसलमर, जोधपुर aur हानुमांगगढ़ States ka merger se baad mein kaisa Rajasthani king aur city ko capital banaye gaye?
explanation_en: After the merger of Bikaner, Jaisalmer, Jodhpur, and Hanumangarh States, Rao Jodha and Bikaner were chosen as the capital by the Rajasthani king.
explanation_hi: बिकानेर, जयसालमर, जोधपुर aur हानुमांगगढ़ स्टेट्स se Bikaner aur Jaisalmer ko Rajasthan mein capital banane ke liye, Rao Jodha aur Bikaner ka chakravarti hua.
